_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Gaur Sportswood
project.address: Plot No. SC-01/E1, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.tagline: The Pinnacle of Active Wellness Living
project.description: Ready-to-move-in sports-centric premium community on 9.88 acres, offering highly spacious 3 BHK and 4 BHK layouts backed by Gaurs Group's outstanding delivery trust.
project.long_description: Gaur Sportswood is a landmark premium township spread over approximately 10 acres in Central Noida, Sector 79. Boasting 11 towers of G+26 floors housing 819 units, the development focuses heavily on active sports, fitness, and wellness living. The layout features massive professional sports courts, dedicated cycling/jogging tracks, and resort landscaping. Built with high structural standards and elegant interior finishes, this ready-to-move society has received complete Completion Certificates, enjoys a flawless legal title, and has fully active bipartite registries directly through the Noida Authority.

builder.name: Gaurs Group
builder.company_overview: Gaurs Group (Gaursons India) is one of Delhi-NCR's most financially stable and trusted real estate giants. Founded in 1995, the group has successfully delivered over 50,000 units across massive integrated townships (Gaur City, Gaur Yamuna City) and premium high-rise enclaves. Recognized for zero-delay deliveries and deep corporate compliance, Gaurs represents absolute safety for Indian and NRI property buyers.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Comfort
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with green park views
unit_types.description: Elegant 3 BHK layout featuring three toilets, large formal living room, and spacious balconies for natural ventilation.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Premium + Servant
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 3 BHK with walk-in dress and servant utility
unit_types.description: Flagship 3 BHK layout featuring a large servant room with independent service entry, walk-in master wardrobe, and wrap-around sports park balconies.
whats_included: Full wooden flooring in Master Bedroom
Italian marble in formal reception foyer

connectivity.name: Noida-Greater Noida Expressway
connectivity.notes: Direct access via Sector 79 main avenues

assumptions: Project fully ready-to-move-in with CC/OC; zero GST applies.
Transfer charges as per Gaurs Group corporate standard norms.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Gaur Sportswood is the absolute safest, highly active, and most structurally sound residential asset in Sector 79, backed by the impeccable financial and delivery reputation of Gaurs Group.
why_buy: Impeccable Developer Credibility: Gaursons has zero NCLT risks, zero outstanding Noida Authority dues, and unmatched trust.
Sports & Active Lifestyle: Features actual, high-quality professional tennis and basketball courts with dedicated cycling lanes.
Immediate Registries: 100% physically complete and legally clear — immediate bipartite sub-lease deed registries are active.
why_avoid: High-Density Vertical Profile: Rising G+26 floors with 11 towers on 10 acres, creating busier common hubs during peak hours.
Moderate Internal Luxury Finishes: Common lobbies and corridor trims use standard premium finishes rather than bespoke luxury marble.
decision_profile.best_for: Fitness and health-conscious families looking for delivered, legally flawless ready-to-move homes with high-trust builder signatures.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers looking for boutique low-rise, low-density luxury estates with under 200 units.

buyerPersonas.headline: Active Healthy Gentry Living
reasons: Dedicated sports layouts, tennis complexes, and safe cycling tracks.
Flawless immediate registrations and bank home loans approval.

riskRadar.description: Project fully delivered with Completion Certificate.
No legal disputes, active bipartite registrations.

persona_profile.income_range: Rs 2 Lakhs - Rs 3.5 Lakhs per month
persona_profile.work_location: Central Noida corporate parks or Sector 142 IT offices
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for high physical security, active health amenities for children, and absolute legal peace of mind.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Gaur Sportswood is a highly defensive and secure residential choice in Central Noida. With zero construction risk and Gaurs' gold-standard corporate transparency, it is an ideal purchase for families prioritizing safety.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Families will find the physical on-ground sports facilities, lush landscaping, and spacious multi-toilet configurations incredibly functional and durable.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Highly liquid wealth-preservation asset. Resale demand is strong due to Gaurs' solid brand positioning, promising stable 7-9% capital gains over a medium horizon.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Excellent. Kids can play in actual designated sports courts, while seniors can walk along highly secure, green-screened pedestrian pathways.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Yields average 3-4% rental returns. Extremely high tenancy appeal among IT professionals working along the Noida Expressway.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Very good mid-to-high premium housing. Beautifully finished towers, though it prioritizes robust durability over bespoke imported interior trims.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero. Perfect legal title, complete CC/OC received, and entirely compliant under UP RERA registries.
walk_away_conditions: Outstanding title clearance issues with a specific resale seller.
negotiation_leverage: Buyers can leverage the high tower count (11 towers) to negotiate competitive resale price quotes.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Proceed immediately. Units priced around ₹14,500 per sqft super area represent an outstanding value play in Sector 79.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Larger project area (10 acres vs 6.18 acres), professional sports courts, and a more financially stable developer brand.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Low density (8 towers vs 11 towers) and 100% corner-flat layout designs.
competitors.verdict: Choose Gaur Sportswood for sports activity, active wellness, and developer trust; choose Elite Golf Greens for corner flat privacy.
competitors.price_delta_note: Gaur Sportswood is ₹1,000/sqft cheaper than Elite Golf Greens.
